A. 2025 MCAHPS Analytic Data Contents 7 

A. 2025 MCAHPS Analytic Data Contents 

The following table is a complete list of all variables in the 2025 MCAHPS analytic data. In addition to analytic survey 
variables, these data contain several administrative and derived variables. These variables names begin with character 
combinations to indicate that they are not survey variables and their meanings are as follows: 

• ws_ - Westat derived variables 

• su_ - Survey processing variables 

• sa_
